nasb.text: You will come from your place out of the remote parts of the north, you and many peoples with you, all of them riding on horses, a great assembly and a mighty army;

esv.text: You will come from your place out of the uttermost parts of the north, you and many peoples with you, all of them riding on horses, a great host, a mighty army.

cnv.text: 你必從你的地方，從北方的極處，與許多民族一起而來，都騎著馬，成為一大隊強盛的軍兵。

ccb.text: 你召集各国联军，组成庞大的军队，骑着马从遥远的北方来。
